steps.title: Use the artistic contrast
steps.content: The word "Unlike" contrasts Saeki's European methods with Hashimoto's Japanese methods. The following sentence confirms Hashimoto used ink and light color on a silk scroll, a traditional Japanese approach.

steps.title: Reject incompatible verbs
steps.content: A would mean Hashimoto avoided traditional Japanese methods, the opposite of the example. B means gave a prize to, and D means scolded; neither can logically take "traditional Japanese approaches" as its object.

steps.title: Choose the loyalty verb
steps.content: Adhered to means followed closely or stayed true to, which matches Hashimoto's use of traditional methods. The answer is C.
